FlavourText.en:
The Order hunts and secures artefacts
too powerful for the world to handle.
FlavourText.zh:
巨灵教追猎并收容那些过于强大、
世间无法掌控的神器。

FlavourText.en:
...there is no telling what damage
could be wrought by such relics.
FlavourText.zh:
……无从知晓这等遗物
会造成何等灾祸。

FlavourText.en: We go where our duty demands.
FlavourText.zh: 职责所在，使命必达。

FlavourText.en: We must remain vigilant.
FlavourText.zh: 我们必须保持警惕。

FlavourText.en:
I have no answers for you.
Some things... simply exist.
FlavourText.zh:
我无法给你答案。
有些东西……只是存在着。

FlavourText.en:
The Order has had Kalguuran
members... at times.
FlavourText.zh:
教团中，有过卡古兰人……
曾经。

FlavourText.en:
We have spent centuries deciphering
Precursor writings. We know... a little.
FlavourText.zh:
我们耗费数个世纪破译先驱者的文字。
所知……不过皮毛。

FlavourText.en:
Twenty years ago, the Order lost
much. We will recover it.
FlavourText.zh:
二十年前，教团失去了太多。
我们会夺回来。

FlavourText.en:
We do not have the benefit of rest.
Our task is never complete.
FlavourText.zh:
我们无法享受休息。
我们的任务永无止境。

FlavourText.en:
As a seeker of powerful artefacts,
I know how to spot master works.
FlavourText.zh:
作为强大神器的追寻者，
我懂得如何识别大师之作。

FlavourText.en:
We are keepers of a world lost
to the marches of time.
FlavourText.zh:
我们是失落于时间洪流，
世界的守护者。

FlavourText.en:
There is a great mystery all around us.
Be careful what you disturb.
FlavourText.zh:
我们周围有一个巨大的谜团。
当心你惊动的东西。

FlavourText.en:
Did you think I would let a simple thing
like dying interfere with our work?
FlavourText.zh:
你以为我会让死亡这等小事
来妨碍我们的工作？

FlavourText.en: Let's make this a little more... efficient.
FlavourText.zh: 让我们把这变得更……高效一些。

FlavourText.en:
The leylines can affect more than just
the terrain... curious...
FlavourText.zh:
地脉能影响的远不止地形……
有意思……

FlavourText.en:
The more we work with these leylines,
the more I feel I... understand them...
FlavourText.zh:
我们对这些地脉研究得越深，
我就越发觉得自己……理解了它们……

FlavourText.en:
Our long-term survival no longer matters.
We are already dead men walking.
FlavourText.zh:
我们的长期生存已无关紧要。
我们已经是行尸走肉。

FlavourText.en:
We will need quite a few resources if
we are to succeed. I will teach you.
FlavourText.zh:
若要成功，我们需要大量资源。
我来教你。

FlavourText.en:
I need more data on a new process.
Please, do what you do best.
FlavourText.zh:
我需要更多新流程的数据。
去吧，做你最擅长的事。

FlavourText.en:
Their creators are long since dust,
but their duty remains.
FlavourText.zh:
它们的创造者早已化为尘土，
但它们的职责犹存。

FlavourText.en:
It's all connected. The Grand Project...
I can almost see its intent...
FlavourText.zh:
一切皆有联系。那个宏大工程……
我几乎能窥见它的意图……

FlavourText.en:
There's some sort of energy flow
underneath reality. Could it be...?
FlavourText.zh:
现实之下存在着某种能量流。
难道……

FlavourText.en:
They are drawn to the power of the
Grand Project. They know not why.
FlavourText.zh: 它们被宏大工程的力量所吸引。它们不知为何。

FlavourText.en:
We need a smarter strategy.
We must aim for the top.
FlavourText.zh:
我们需要更明智的策略。
我们必须瞄准顶峰。

FlavourText.en: What's gotten into this lot, I wonder?
FlavourText.zh: 我怀疑，这帮家伙是怎么了？

FlavourText.en:
Some days you're the spear,
some days you're the boar!
FlavourText.zh:
有时你是那长矛，
有时你是那野猪！

FlavourText.en:
Something terrible
happened here long ago.
FlavourText.zh:
很久以前，
这里发生过可怕的事情。

FlavourText.en: They're not gonna make it easy.
FlavourText.zh: 他们不会让我们轻易得逞。

FlavourText.en:
Some days, the hunt is
thankless and brutal.
FlavourText.zh:
有些时候，狩猎是费力不讨好的，
是残酷的。

FlavourText.en:
Sometimes, they hold out for bigger prey.
I ken there's a reason.
FlavourText.zh:
有时候，它们会等待更大的猎物。
我知道，其中必有缘由。

FlavourText.en:
All you've got do is listen, aye,
and they'll guide you on.
FlavourText.zh:
你只需倾听，对，
他们便会指引你前行。

FlavourText.en:
Got no idea what they say,
but they seem to fit together.
FlavourText.zh:
完全搞不懂上面写的是什么，
但它们似乎能结合到一起。

FlavourText.en:
Something's changin' 'em.
Be ready to get bloody.
FlavourText.zh:
有什么东西正在改变它们。
准备好浴血奋战吧。

FlavourText.en:
I'll make some noise and holler. Let's
see if I can drive them your way!
FlavourText.zh:
我会制造声响，大声吆喝。
看我能不能把他们赶向你那边！

FlavourText.en:
Use every part of what you kill.
To do otherwise is disrespectful.
FlavourText.zh:
利用你所杀之物的每一部分。
否则便是大不敬。

FlavourText.en:
You really wanna challenge their claim?
Alright then... let's see how this goes.
FlavourText.zh:
你真想挑战他们的宣称？好吧……
那就拭目以待吧。
